leadText: Hypno (Japanese: スリーパー Sleeper) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Drowzee starting at level 26.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Hypno is a bipedal, slightly humanoid Pokémon that has yellow skin. It has triangular ears with brown interiors, sleepy-looking eyes, and a large nose. On its neck, it has a ruff of white fur, which is longer on the female. Hypno has five fingers on each hand and holds a pendulum in its left. The pendulum resembles a flat, silver ring and is used for hypnotism. Hypno is never seen without it. It has three toes on each foot, which also have a pink pad on the undersides. Hypno is able to put people to sleep by swinging its pendulum. It is known to reside away from humans and on less-traveled roads . While it awaits its prey, it polishes its pendulum. If anyone comes by, Hypno will hypnotize them and eat their dreams. It carries away people having good dreams and is even known to have stolen a child at one point. However, in the Alola region , it preys primarily on Komala , and cases of Hypno targeting humans are notably rare. Some Hypno are even known to assist doctors in hospitals when their patients cannot sleep at night. In the Trainers' School in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon , a Hypno is shown to be capable of creating illusions, namely by disguising itself as a human and causing illusory children to appear. As shown in Battling Besties! , Hypno is left feeling completely despondent if its pendulum gets damaged in any way. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Hypno evolves from Drowzee . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Drowzee Psychic → First Evolution Hypno Psychic

Green Red (ENG) When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion . Blue Yellow Avoid eye contact if you come across one. It will try to put you to sleep by using its pendulum. Stadium If you lock eyes with it, it will try to hypnotize you. It is best to close your eyes quickly before you get hypnotized. Generation II Johto #088 Gold When it is very hungry, it puts humans it meets to sleep, then it feasts on their dreams. Silver Always holding a pendulum that it rocks at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby. Crystal The longer it swings its pendulum, the longer the effects of its hypnosis last. Stadium 2 When it is very hungry, it puts humans it meets to sleep, then it feasts on their dreams. (Pokémon Red, Silver, or Crystal inserted) Always holding a pendulum that it rocks at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby. (Pokémon Blue, Gold, or Yellow inserted) Generation III Hoenn #— Kanto #097 Ruby Hypno holds a pendulum in its hand. The arcing movement and glitter of the pendulum lull the foe into a deep state of hypnosis. While this Pok é mon searches for prey, it polishes the pendulum. Sapphire Emerald The arcing movement and glitter of the pendulum in a Hypno 's hand lull the foe into deep hypnosis. While searching for prey, it polishes the pendulum. FireRed It carries a pendulum-like device. There once was an incident in which it took away a child it hypnotized. LeafGreen When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion . Generation IV Sinnoh #— Johto #088 Diamond Seeing its swinging pendulum can induce sleep in three seconds, even in someone who just woke up. Pearl Platinum HeartGold When it is very hungry, it puts humans it meets to sleep, then it feasts on their dreams. SoulSilver Always holding a pendulum that it swings at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby. Generation V Unova #— Black Seeing its swinging pendulum can induce sleep in three seconds, even in someone who just woke up. White Black 2 Seeing its swinging pendulum can induce sleep in three seconds, even in someone who just woke up. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X It carries a pendulum-like device. There once was an incident in which it took away a child it hypnotized. Y Seeing its swinging pendulum can induce sleep in three seconds, even in someone who just woke up. Omega Ruby Hypno holds a pendulum in its hand. The arcing movement and glitter of the pendulum lull the foe into a deep state of hypnosis. While this Pokémon searches for prey, it polishes the pendulum. Alpha Sapphire Generation VII Alola S M : #055 Alola US UM : #067 Kanto #097 Sun While it is an extremely dangerous Pokémon, people who are in need of a good, sound sleep call it their savior. Moon As a matter of course, it makes anyone it meets fall asleep and has a taste of their dreams. Anyone having a good dream, it carries off. Ultra Sun In Alola, Komala is Hypno's main target. It rarely harms people. Ultra Moon There are some Hypno that assist doctors with patients who can't sleep at night in hospitals. Let's Go Pikachu Avoid eye contact if you come across one. It will try to put you to sleep by using its pendulum. Let's Go Eevee Generation VIII Galar #— Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Sword, Shield , and Legends: Arceus . Brilliant Diamond Seeing its swinging pendulum can induce sleep in three seconds, even in someone who just woke up. Shining Pearl Generation IX Paldea #67 Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves, such as Hypnosis and Confusion . Violet Always holding a pendulum that it swings at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry EP027 Hypno Ash's Pokédex Hypno, a Hypnosis Pokémon. It carries a pendulum-like device and performs hypnotic attacks .
